<!--
Thanks for contributing to DomainFi Agent Toolkit.
Keep changes small and focused. The repo is currently a static project page
and proposal/prototype scope, so most PRs are documentation, structure, or
template improvements.
-->

## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Static site / `index.html` change
- [ ] Validator or CI change
- [ ] New starter template / example
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and followed its expectations.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private keys, wallet seed phrases, or production credentials are included.
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_repo.py` passes locally.
- [ ] Documentation/README is updated if the change affects user-visible behavior.
- [ ] External links use `rel="noopener noreferrer"` when `target="_blank"`.

## Additional context

<!-- Issue links, screenshots, deploy preview URLs, or any other useful context. -->
